data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of typed consequence modes, but the evidence provided does not confirm their implementation. The linked use case mentions the need for these modes, but there is no evidence of their actual existence or functionality in the system. Additionally, the prior step evidence does not include any checks or validations related to consequence modes, indicating a gap in the required coverage.
gaps: Typed consequence modes (warning, suspension, compensation/payment adjustments, queue review, workflow trigger, custom) are not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
